name: v07-sse-stream
description: v0.7 PR 3 demo — SSE trigger. Subscribes the open stream to the in-process bus channel `sse-demo` and pumps events out as SSE frames via @blokjs/sse-stream. Pair with v07-sse-publish (HTTP POST) to push events from another workflow run into the same channel: every connected SSE client receives them in real time. Streams indefinitely until the client disconnects or the publisher stops emitting.
